title: MAH BEd CET Result 2026 - Over View

detail.title: MAH BEd CET Result 2026 - Over View
detail.short_info: MAH BEd CET Result 2026 is expected to be declared On 21st May 2026 at cetcell.mahacet.org. Check how to download your scorecard, understand cut off trends, and know the next steps for BEd counselling.

content.text: MAH BEd CET Result 2026 is expected to be declared online today, and candidates can check their scorecard on the official CET Cell website at cetcell.mahacet.org using their login details. This result will decide your eligibility and position in the admission process for Bachelor of Education (BEd) colleges across Maharashtra.

The State Common Entrance Test Cell publishes the MAH BEd CET result in the form of an individual scorecard, which carries your marks and rank as per the exam performance. Once the link is active, you can simply log in with your application ID and date of birth, download the PDF, and use it later during counselling.

sections.heading: MAH BEd CET Result 2026 - Over View

rows: MAH BEd CET 2026 (Bachelor of Education Common Entrance Test)
State Common Entrance Test Cell, Maharashtra
Around late May 2026 (today’s release is anticipated)

sections.heading: MAH BEd CET Result 2026 Link (Official Website)

content.text: The MAH BEd CET Result 2026 link will be activated on the official website of the State CET Cell only. You should avoid relying on unofficial links or random social media posts that promise “direct result link” but don’t actually take you to the official portal.
The official result link will be hosted at:

items: Main website: cetcell.mahacet.org
Result access: Through the BEd CET 2026 candidate login or dedicated “Result / Score Card” link provided on the homepage when declared.

content.text: To access the link smoothly, keep your MAH BEd CET 2026 Application ID and password or date of birth ready before you visit the website.

sections.heading: How to Check MAH BEd CET Result 2026 Online

content.text: The process to check the MAH BEd CET Result 2026 is pretty straightforward, even if you are using a mobile phone. Follow these steps once the result link goes live:

items: Go to the official website of the CET Cell: cetcell.mahacet.org.
On the homepage, look for the link that says “MAH BEd CET 2026 Result” or “Candidate Login - BEd CET”.
Click on the link; you will be redirected to the login page.
Enter your MAH BEd CET 2026 Application ID and your date of birth or password in the respective fields.
Click on the “Login” or “View Scorecard” button.
Your MAH BEd CET 2026 result / scorecard will appear on the screen in PDF or web format.
Download the scorecard and save it as a PDF on your device.
Take 1-2 printouts for future use during counselling and document verification.

content.text: If the website is slow or shows an error, just wait a few minutes and try again; heavy traffic is common just after result declaration.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on MAH BEd CET 2026 Scorecard

content.text: Once you open your MAH BEd CET scorecard, do not just look at the marks and close it. Take a quick minute to check whether all details printed on it are correct.
Generally, the MAH BEd CET 2026 result / scorecard carries the following information:

items: Candidate’s name
Photograph and signature (as per application form)
Roll number / seat number
Application ID / registration number
Date of birth
Category and reservation details (if applicable)
Marks obtained in MAH BEd CET 2026
Total marks of the exam
Rank / percentile (if mentioned for the cycle)
Qualifying status (whether you have cleared the exam as per cut off)
Important instructions by CET Cell

content.text: If you notice spelling mistakes in your name, wrong category details, or any mismatch in marks, you should contact the CET Cell helpdesk or raise a query through the official channels mentioned on the website.

sections.heading: MAH BEd CET Result 2026 - Important Instructions

content.text: To avoid unnecessary stress on result day, keep these simple instructions in mind:

items: Use a stable internet connection while checking the result.
Prefer a modern browser like Chrome, Edge, or Firefox for smooth access to the CET Cell website.
In case of heavy traffic, wait and refresh after some time instead of entering your details repeatedly.
Always check that the URL in the address bar is the official one: cetcell.mahacet.org.
Do not share your application ID and password openly with others.
For official communication, rely only on notifications published on the CET Cell website or verified notices from your college.
